game_name: Indiana Jones and the Fate of Atlantis

sub_pixel_system.notes: Point-and-click adventure game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Path Selection System
special_mechanics.description: Three gameplay modes available: Team Path (with AI partner), Wits Path (puzzle-focused), Fists Path (action/combat-focused). Each path affects story, puzzles, and locations.

special_mechanics.name: Optional Combat
special_mechanics.description: Fist fighting sequences present, particularly in Fists Path. Combat mechanics not quantified in available documentation.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative): This is a point-and-click adventure game using the SCUMM engine. No precise physics parameters, movement speeds, or gravity values are documented in available sources. The game focuses on puzzle-solving and narrative rather than precise movement mechanics. Combat and action sequences exist but are not quantified.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Indiana Jones and the Fate of Atlantis
